utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Now check if each is fully specified per the description: 
- property: has selected property with details (name, address, beds, baths, size in m2 and sqft) and price — fully specified.
- financing: provides a financing solution with terms (type, down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate example, loan term, estimated monthly payment, associated fees) — fully specified.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (package, lawyer fees, disbursements, HST, land transfer tax estimate) — fully specified.
- moving_services: moving arrangements with costs (type and cost) — fully specified.
- setup_services: utility and setup services (connection fees and estimated monthly utilities) — fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (property price, down payment, itemized closing/initial fees subtotal, total initial outlay, estimated monthly expenses) — fully specified. All 6 items are included and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific selections that correspond to items in the ground-truth ratings: Property: Historic Townhouse; Financing: Traditional Mortgage; Legal services: Basic Legal Package; Moving services: Standard Moving; Utility setup: Basic Utilities (implied by utility_connection_fees labeled as basic utilities). Each of these items has a direct match in the provided ground-truth lists.
